summary: Completed testing of Discount Engine (Motor de Reglas de Descuento) - NEW FEATURE. All 20 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend Descuentos tab verified working. PaymentScreen discount button verified via code review (requires active bill to test in browser).
critical_code_review_comments: Discount types (PERCENTAGE, FIXED_AMOUNT, NEW_PRICE) properly validated with regex patterns
Value > 0 validation enforced by Pydantic Field(gt=0)
Calculate endpoint properly returns 400 for missing params, 404 for invalid discount/bill
Date range and Happy Hour schedule filtering work correctly in /active endpoint
seed_data_creation: Three test discounts exist: Happy Hour 20% (PERCENTAGE, CASHIER), VIP 10% (PERCENTAGE, MANAGER_PIN_REQUIRED), Promo RD$100 (FIXED_AMOUNT, CASHIER)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Discount Engine feature fully implemented and tested. Backend: /api/discounts CRUD + /api/discounts/active + /api/discounts/calculate endpoints all working. Frontend: Settings > Descuentos tab works for discount management. PaymentScreen has discount button (data-testid='discount-btn') that opens discount selection dialog. Manager PIN verification required for discounts with authorization_level='MANAGER_PIN_REQUIRED'. Testing the PaymentScreen discount flow requires creating an active order/bill first (no products/categories exist in current test data).

backend_crud.GET /api/discounts: PASS - Returns list of all discounts
backend_crud.POST /api/discounts: PASS - Creates discount with all field types

backend_active.GET /api/discounts/active: PASS - Returns only active discounts with valid date/schedule

backend_validation.Invalid authorization_level: PASS - Returns 422 for invalid auth level
backend_validation.Value <= 0: PASS - Returns 422 for zero or negative value

frontend_settings.Create modal form fields: PASS - All fields present (name, description, type, value, scope, target_ids, authorization_level, dates, schedule, active)

frontend_payment_screen.Manager PIN dialog: PASS - discountPinDialog state and verifyDiscountPin function

discount_scopes_tested: CATEGORY - Applies to specific categories (requires target_ids)
SPECIFIC_PRODUCTS - Applies to specific products (requires target_ids)
